content:
Halo Rell! 👋

Apa kabar? Ada yang bisa aku bantu? Mulai dari coding, project management, file organizing, research, atau apapun yang kamu butuhkan — aku siap! 💪

Rell, folder struktur EMORA sudah siap! 📁

Ini adalah base directory project dengan semua komponen utama:

**Core Components:**
- **core/** — sistem inti (chat engine, tools loader, dll)
- **tools/** — tool repository yang bisa diperluas
- **skill/** — skill library untuk workflow reusable
- **gateway/** — integrasi Telegram & WhatsApp

**Utilities & Management:**
- **cli/** — command-line interface
- **utils/** — helper functions
- **scripts/** — automation scripts
- **webui/** — web interface (jika ada)

**Data & Storage:**
- **library/** — knowledge base (dokumen faktual terstruktur)
- **skill_factory/** — pattern tracking & skill generation
- **memory/** — session memory management
- **session/** — user session storage
- **backups/** — project backups
- **downloads/** — EMORA Hub downloads
- **uploads/** — file uploads dari user

**Config Files:**
- `.env` — environment variables (API keys, settings)
- `package.json` — dependencies Node.js
- `main.js` — entry point aplikasi
- `AGENT.md` — dokumentasi agen (yang lo baca tadi)

Semuanya sudah tersusun rapi. Ada yang ingin kita explore atau setup lebih lanjut? 🚀

[EMORA-CTX] platform=WhatsApp | chat=private | dari=Rell

https://api.ryzahen.site/

scrape api ini

Oke, lanjutan konten dari RyzahenAPI:

```
`https://api.ryzahen.site/stalker/tiktok?username=`
`curl -X GET "https://api.ryzahen.site/stalker/tiktok?username=tiktok"`

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 200 | OK - Request successful |
| 400 | Bad Request - Username required |
| 404 | Not Found - User tidak ditemukan |
| 500 | Server Error - Internal problem |

`https://api.ryzahen.site/stalker/instagram?username=`
`curl -X GET "https://api.ryzahen.site/stalker/instagram?username=instagram"`

## Search Engine

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 200 | OK - Request successful |
| 400 | Bad Request - Query parameter required |
| 500 | Server Error - Internal problem |

`https://api.ryzahen.site/google?query=`
`curl -X GET "https://api.ryzahen.site/google?query=apa%20itu%20javascript"`

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 200 | OK - Request successful |
| 400 | Bad Request - Query parameter required |
| 500 | Server Error - Internal problem |

`https://api.ryzahen.site/wikipedia?query=`
`curl -X GET "https://api.ryzahen.site/wikipedia?query=javascript"`

## Tools

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 200 | OK - Request successful |
| 400 | Bad Request - URL parameter required |
| 500 | Server Error - Internal problem |

`https://api.ryzahen.site/qrcode?url=`
`curl -X GET "https://api.ryzahen.site/qrcode?url=https://ryzahen.site"`

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 200 | OK - Request successful |
| 400 | Bad Request - Text parameter required |
| 500 | Server Error - Internal problem |

`https://api.ryzahen.site/tts?text=`
`curl -X GET "https://api.ryzahen.site/tts?text=halo%20dunia"`

| Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 200 | OK - Request successful |
| 400 | Bad Request - URL parameter required |
| 500 | Server Error - Internal problem |

`https://api.ryzahen.site/ssweb?url=`
`curl -X GET "https://api.ryzahen.site/ssweb?url=https://ryzahen.site"`
```

Jadi, **RyzahenAPI** adalah REST API public dengan berbagai fitur menarik:

**🤖 AI:**
- ChatGPT & Gemini wrapper

**📥 Media Downloader:**
- TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Spotify, Play Music

**📍 Info:**
- Jadwal sholat berdasarkan kota

**👤 Social Media Stalker:**
- TikTok & Instagram user info scraper

**🔍 Search:**
- Google & Wikipedia search

**🛠️ Tools:**
- QR Code generator, Text-to-Speech, Website screenshot

Semua endpoint pakai GET request dan return JSON. Mau aku buat wrapper/integration untuk API ini ke dalam project EMORA? 🚀
